HomePage.searchPlaceholder: What did you see in your dream?

InlineCTA.title: What is DreamBoat?
InlineCTA.description:
Stop searching for dream interpretations from various sources. DreamBoat is your personal assistant that records your dreams with your emotions and interprets them with advanced AI models.

You can transform your dreams into works of art, use them as backgrounds, or share them with loved ones. You can also favorite dreams, search through past dreams, and track your monthly emotional changes.

With weekly and monthly analyses, discover prominent themes while understanding the effects of Moon phases and cosmic events on your dreams.

MeaningPage.faq1Question: What does it mean to see {symbol} in a dream?
MeaningPage.faq2Question: Is seeing {symbol} in a dream good or bad?
MeaningPage.faq2Answer: Seeing {symbol} in a dream can carry both positive and negative meanings depending on the context of the dream. The emotions you felt during the dream and the surrounding details are key to a more accurate interpretation.
MeaningPage.faq3Question: What does it mean to keep dreaming about {symbol}?
MeaningPage.faq3Answer: Recurring dreams about {symbol} suggest that your subconscious is trying to draw your attention to an important message. This repetition indicates an unresolved emotional or psychological pattern that needs your awareness.

Footer.disclaimer: Dream interpretations are for informational purposes only and do not replace professional advice.
